title: A method that worked for me. doubling my investment portfolio in 90 days.
author: Hairy-Radio-5041
selftext:
Looking at this chart, most people see the +121% and think it's about finding the next ten bagger.

Honestly, the biggest change wasn't what I bought. It was what I stopped doing.

I quit chasing every breakout and every headline. Instead, I spent more time waiting for setups I actually understood and managing risk when nothing looked right.

My rules are simple:Only buy ideas I have conviction in. Keep position sizes under control. Cut losers without hesitation. Let winners have room to grow. Never let emotions make the decision.

Over the last 90 days, only a handful of trades made a meaningful difference. The patience between them was just as valuable.

The older I get, the more I believe fast money comes from luck, but long-term wealth comes from discipline and consistency.

The market will always offer opportunities. The hard part is having the patience to wait until one truly fits your plan.

I'm fortunate to have met several like-minded friends. We exchange market insights daily, discussing the logic behind our positions, not just what to buy. We focus more on: Why enter now? Where are the risks? Are emotions affecting our judgment? When is the best strategy to remain on the sidelines? We don't provide trading instructions or guarantee profits. We focus more on exchanging ideas.

Our backgrounds are diverse, ranging from novices to experienced investors. Disagreements are common, but these different perspectives have significantly reduced my blind confidence and impulsive trading.
